cases.description: Business report request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a 4-page quarterly business report with key metrics
expectations: Follows the Report structure (Cover → Exec Summary → TOC → Sections → Conclusions → Next Steps → Appendix)
Produces HTML with embedded CSS, print-ready A4 styles
Checks for a brand skill and applies its tokens if present
Runs the codi-box-validator skill on the output before delivering

cases.description: Client proposal request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: draft a proposal for the Acme Corp migration project
expectations: Uses the Proposal structure (Problem → Solution → Scope → Timeline → Investment → About Us)
Produces branded HTML suitable for PDF export
Mentions pandoc as the DOCX export path if the user needs Word

cases.description: One-pager case study triggers the skill
cases.prompt: build a one-pager case study for our customer launch
expectations: Uses the One-Pager or Case Study structure (not full report)
Emits metric boxes and callouts per the component reference
Single-page print via the skill's @page A4 rules

cases.description: Slide deck request does NOT trigger doc-engine
cases.prompt: create a 10-slide pitch deck for our Series B
expectations: Routes to codi-content-factory (slides) or codi-pptx instead
Does NOT produce a single A4 HTML document

cases.description: README request does NOT trigger doc-engine
cases.prompt: write a README for this GitHub repo
expectations: Does NOT activate doc-engine skill (no branded PDF needed)
Produces plain Markdown, not embedded-CSS HTML
